name: remotty
description: Setup and operations for the remotty Windows bridge for Codex and Telegram.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and run the Windows Codex Telegram bridge from plugin skills
interface.longDescription: Use plugin skills to register the current project, configure the Telegram bot token, pair an allowed sender, start or inspect the bridge, and run live checks without exposing secrets in terminal output.
defaultPrompt: Register this project for remotty, configure Telegram, and guide me through pairing before starting the Windows bridge
